nasb.text: The Lord called your name, “A green olive tree, beautiful in fruit and form”; With the noise of a great tumult He has kindled fire on it, And its branches are worthless.

esv.text: The Lord once called you ‘a green olive tree, beautiful with good fruit.’ But with the roar of a great tempest he will set fire to it, and its branches will be consumed.

cnv.text: 耶和華曾稱你的名字為 壯麗、多結美果的青橄欖樹； 現在他必藉風暴雷轟， 把它燃點起來， 它的枝子也都折斷。

ccb.text: 耶和华曾称他们为枝繁叶茂、果实佳美的橄榄树，但现在祂要在呼啸的风暴中把它点燃，烧毁它的枝条。
